column1: # NEVER TESTED: TTT_ENABLED and SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED have 0 runs in history.
# All top-5 leaderboard entries use TTT — highest-value gap remaining.
# Leaderboard unexplored range: TTT_LR 0.003-0.007 (they used 0.005 default).
# sliding_only isolates sliding-window gain for free (no TTT overhead).
# Highest-value runs first so queue delivers even if we stop early.
# NOTE: run with TIMEOUT_SECS=2400 — TTT eval adds ~10min vs baseline.
